# openrouter_workspaces (Data Source)

Lists OpenRouter workspaces visible to the management key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openrouter_workspaces" "all" {}

output "workspace_slugs" {
  value = [for workspace in data.openrouter_workspaces.all.workspaces : workspace.slug]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `workspaces` (Attributes List) OpenRouter workspaces. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces))

- `is_data_discount_logging_enabled` (Boolean)
- `is_observability_broadcast_enabled` (Boolean)
- `is_observability_io_logging_enabled` (Boolean)

- `slug` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
